name: Jiangsu Wujin Stainless Steel Pipe Group CO.,LTD.
summary: Jiangsu Wujin Stainless Steel Pipe Group CO.,LTD. researches, develops, manufactures, and sells stainless steel and nickel alloy seamless pipes, welded pipes, fittings, and flanges in China and internationally. Its products are primarily used in the power station boiler, nuclear power, petroleum, petrochemical, chemical, coal chemical, salt chemical, LNG, photovoltaic power generation, solar thermal electric power generation, ship and ocean engineering, pressure vessel, and machinery manufacturing industries. The company was founded in 1970 and is based in Changzhou, China.
